completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part monorepo with 3 parts: flutter_app (mobile), server (backend), web_landing (web)
Found 4 existing docs: SETUP_AND_DEPLOYMENT.md, flutter README, server-ci.yml, docker-compose.yml. Plus ~80 BMAD planning/implementation artifacts.
Tech stack: Flutter 3.9 + Fastify 5 + PostgreSQL 16 + Socket.IO + Firebase
Exhaustive scan: read all ~200 source files across 7 parallel agents. API: 21 endpoints + 50+ socket events. Data: 5 tables + 20+ in-memory stores. UI: 44 widgets, 8 providers, 6 screens.
Source tree documented with all critical folders annotated
Dev setup and deployment documented from existing SETUP_AND_DEPLOYMENT.md + CI workflow
Integration architecture documented: 9 integration points across 3 parts + 5 external services
Architecture docs written for 2 parts (server + flutter_app). Web landing is simple static site.
All supporting docs written: project-overview, source-tree-analysis, component-inventory, development-guide, api-contracts, data-models
Master index generated with all links

findings.technology_stack: Flutter 3.9 on Dart, Fastify 5 on TypeScript, PostgreSQL 16
findings.data_summary: 5 tables, 20+ in-memory stores, JSONB for state/events/summary
findings.ui_summary: 44 widgets, 8 providers, 6 screens, 5 vibes, 8 DJ states
